# QUESTIONS.md — Clarifying Questions for Phase 2 Planning
# Generated by agent on 2026-07-15
# Status: ANSWERED

---

**[SCOPE] Q1: Phase 2 Theme**
> Question: What should “Phase 2” mean for this delivery cycle?

- A) Local production-readiness and hardening — finish requirements,
  reliability, tests, configuration, and documentation before any cloud
  migration
- B) AWS migration
- C) Cloud-ready preparation only
- D) Combined hardening and AWS migration
- CN) Clarification needed

Answer: A

---

**[SCOPE] Q2: Phase 2 Breadth**
> Question: How broad should the Phase 2 commitment be?

- A) Complete all recommended hardening work as one Phase 2 release
- B) Only complete the four items previously listed in the active backlog
- C) Select a smaller must-have subset after estimates are prepared
- D) Include new end-user features in addition to hardening
- CN) Clarification needed

Answer: A

---

**[RELIABILITY] Q3: Retry Behaviour**
> Question: Should Phase 2 implement configurable automatic retries for
> transient processing failures while retaining manual retry?

- A) Add classified, configurable automatic retries plus the existing manual
  retry
- B) Keep manual retry only and update the requirements to match
- C) Retry every processing failure automatically
- CN) Clarification needed

Answer: A

---

**[FEATURE] Q4: Long Meeting Support**
> Question: Should long-transcript chunking and hierarchical minutes generation
> be a required Phase 2 deliverable?

- A) Implement chunking, partial summaries, and final aggregation in Phase 2
- B) Keep the current limit and improve validation/user messaging only
- C) Raise or tune the single-pass limit without adding chunking
- CN) Clarification needed

Answer: A

---

**[SECURITY] Q5: Deployment Boundary**
> Question: Will Phase 2 remain a trusted local application, or may it become
> remotely accessible?

- A) Trusted local use only — keep authentication out of Phase 2
- B) Private network/shared internal deployment
- C) Public cloud deployment
- CN) Clarification needed

Answer: A

---

**[SCOPE] Q6: Completion Gate**
> Question: What evidence should be required before Phase 2 is considered
> complete?

- A) Backend build/tests, frontend lint/build/tests, integration tests, and a
  documented end-to-end test pass
- B) Build plus focused unit tests and manual end-to-end verification
- C) Build and manual acceptance testing only
- CN) Clarification needed

Answer: A

---

## Confirmed Phase 2 direction

Phase 2 is a comprehensive local production-readiness and hardening release.
It retains the trusted-local deployment boundary, adds classified automatic
retry and long-meeting support, and requires comprehensive automated and
documented end-to-end verification. Cloud deployment and authentication remain
outside Phase 2.
